name: Precautionary Areas and Moving Prohibited Zones

description.s: Precautionary Areas are navigable channels for vessels restricted by draught. When such a vessel is in the area, it will have a Moving Prohibited Zone around it, which is an area ahead and to the sides that a small vessel cannot enter.

content.sourcePath: Daily/2025/10/09/Precautionary Areas and Moving Prohibited Zones.md
